error.dependency_not_installed: Required dependency failed to install. Restart Home Assistant and check logs.
error.dependency_load_failed: Required dependency failed to load. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

reconfigure.title: Update device connection settings
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for {device_name}. The device will be validated and the integration will reload.

init.title: Integration Settings & Features
init.description: Configure polling interval and enable/disable features. All advanced feature settings are available in the next step and are preserved even when features are disabled.

data.host: Host - Device IP address or hostname
data.update_interval: Update interval (seconds) - How often to poll the device (min: 5, max: 600)
data.enable_services: Enable Custom Services - Control boost, mode, error codes via custom Home Assistant services
data.enable_mqtt: Enable MQTT Transport - Use MQTT for device communication instead of HTTP
data.enable_calibration: Enable Sensor Calibration - Apply per-entity offset and multiplier adjustments
data.enable_alerts: Enable Alert Rules - Create threshold and state-change alerts with notifications

features.title: Advanced Feature Settings
features.description: Configure transport, calibration, and alert settings. All fields are shown for easier management, and values are preserved for later use when features are re-enabled.

data.transport: Transport Protocol - Runtime protocol used when MQTT transport is enabled
data.mqtt_base_topic: MQTT Base Topic - Root topic used when MQTT transport is enabled (default: geyserwala)
data.calibrations_json: Sensor Calibrations (JSON) - Applied when Sensor Calibration is enabled
data.alert_rules_json: Alert Rules (JSON) - Applied when Alert Rules is enabled
